body.content: For the first time at Barbecue Expo, Soon Grill is coming to showcase the excellence of Asian barbecue. A leading name in Korean barbecue in Paris, with several renowned restaurants across the capital, the brand is known for the precision of its marinades, the quality of its meats, and its mastery of tabletop grilling.  At Barbecue Expo, Soon Grill will be sharing this unique expertise and demonstrating how Korean fire-cooking culture fully belongs within the world of barbecue. It is a meeting point between Asian tradition, grill cooking, and a passion for live fire — offering visitors the chance to discover another side of barbecue from Asia.
